productDisplayName: Fila Men's Fuel HI Black Shoe
description: This pair of black high top sneakers from the Fuel-Hi range of fila is designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair it with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and colourful tees from the wide range available at myntra and create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Black cotton canvas uppers with logo graphic on the heel for support and protection White lace-ups for a snug Fit Lightly cushioned insole for greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Durable gum rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for extra grip Toe guard for greater protection and extra durability Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
